name: Git (local workspace)
description: Run real git in the shared workspace: clone, branch, add, commit, push, pull, status, log, diff. Credentials are resolved automatically from the project — never pass tokens. Requires the shared workspace.

args.name: action
args.description: clone | init | status | branch | checkout | add | commit | push | pull | fetch | log | diff | current_branch

args.name: branch
args.description: [branch/checkout/push/pull] branch name; defaults to the current branch for push/pull

args.name: add_all
args.description: [commit] stage all changes (git add -A) before committing

args.name: paths
args.description: [add] paths to stage; defaults to all (.)

args.name: path
args.description: [diff] limit the diff to this path

args.name: staged
args.description: [diff] show staged changes instead of the working tree

args.name: repo_url
args.description: [clone] repository URL; defaults to the project's repo
